name: Mobile SDK for iOS – Installation and Configuration
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can create Mobile SDKs in Maropost Marketing Cloud and download the setup files while developing your iOS apps."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn more about creating and managing Mobile Apps, read our "}, {"text": "Mobile App Profiles", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Maropost's Mobile SDK for iOS requires "}, {"text": "Xcode version 8.0.0", "bold": true}, {"text": " or above."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Upload the Push Notification Client SSL Certificate"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On the Push Campaigns index page, click the Edit icon for the mobile application. Then, select the iOS tab."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "iOS App Bundle Identifier", "bold": true}, {"text": " - This will always be "}, {"text": "com.development.maropost"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Push Certificate", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Create your "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developer.apple.com/library/ios/documentation/IDEs/Conceptual/AppDistributionGuide/AddingCapabilities/AddingCapabilities.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40012582-CH26-SW6", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "push notification client SSL certificate", "bold": true}]}, {"text": ". You can then export the certificate as Personal Information Exchange format (.p12 file extension) or as Privacy Enhanced Mail format (.pem file extension). Upload the file as shown on the screen."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Push Key PEM", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Upload the .pem file containing the Push Key"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Certificate Password", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Enter the push notification client SSL certificate key here."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Install the Maropost Mobile SDK for iOS"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can download the mobile SDK configuration and setup files from MMC and install these files in your iOS staging apps."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From the Maropost Marketing Cloud Account, click on your "}, {"text": "profile", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": ".

Finally, add these files to your iOS app as a library.
"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp11.05T5g00000xW7p3EAC.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/mobapp11.05T5g00000xW7p3EAC.png", "name": "User-added image", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 525, "width": 700}}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click the [Bitcode Disabled] or the [Bitcode Enabled] button to download the SDK to your desktop."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you are downloading the SDK for Xcode 12 (Swift 5.3), drag MPPushKit.framework into the top level of your app.

"}, {"text": "For Xcode 12 (Swift 5.3)", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add Maropost's MPPushKit.framework in the Embedded Frameworks section of the Project target's general settings as shown below:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXAx.05T5g00000BkXAxEAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXAx.05T5g00000BkXAxEAN.png", "name": "Project_Settings.jpeg", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 679, "width": 1280}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"bold": true, "text": "For Xcode 9 (Swift 4.1.2 and below), Xcode 10 (Swift 4.2.1), and Xcode 10 (Swift 5.0)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add Maropost's MPPush.framework in the Embedded Frameworks section of the Project target's general settings, as shown below:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEg.05T5g00000BkXEgEAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEg.05T5g00000BkXEgEAN.png", "name": "3.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 389, "width": 768}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "

 Add these required frameworks to your project:"}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "CoreLocation.framework"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "SystemConfiguration.framework"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The framework supports both device and simulator architectures. However, since simulator architectures aren’t supported while publishing the app to the App Store, you will need to add the following script in the Run Script section of Build Phases in your project settings. This script will ensure that the simulator architectures get stripped away at the time of archiving."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "APP_PATH="${TARGET_BUILD_DIR}/${WRAPPER_NAME}""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "# This script loops through the frameworks embedded in the application and"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "# removes unused architectures."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "find "$APP_PATH" -name '*.framework' -type d | while read -r FRAMEWORK"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "do"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_NAME=$(defaults read "$FRAMEWORK/Info.plist" CFBundleExecutable)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH="$FRAMEWORK/$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_NAME""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "echo "Executable is $FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "EXTRACTED_ARCHS=()"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "for ARCH in $ARCHS"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "do"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "echo "Extracting $ARCH from $FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_NAME""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "lipo -extract "$ARCH" "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH" -o "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH-$ARCH""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "EXTRACTED_ARCHS+=("$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH-$ARCH")"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "done"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "echo "Merging extracted architectures: ${ARCHS}""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "lipo -o "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH-merged" -create "${EXTRACTED_ARCHS[@]}""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "rm "${EXTRACTED_ARCHS[@]}""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "echo "Replacing original executable with thinned version""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "rm "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "mv "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH-merged" "$FRAMEWORK_EXECUTABLE_PATH""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": Add it to the top level of your project."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEh.05T5g00000BkXEhEAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEh.05T5g00000BkXEhEAN.png", "name": "4.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 282, "width": 736}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The configuration file includes the system-generated AppKey, AppID, AccountID, and an inProduction boolean value, which looks similar to the following example:"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEi.05T5g00000BkXEiEAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEi.05T5g00000BkXEiEAN.png", "name": "5.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 312, "width": 642}}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "
Choose the option when adding the .plist file"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If you do not wish to add the MPConfig.plist to your project, you'll need to initiate the SDK by setting the required values manually."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Swift", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.startup(withApplicationKey: ""}, {"text": "your_app_key", "italic": true}, {"text": "", withAppId: ""}, {"text": "your_app_id", "italic": true}, {"text": "", withAccountId: ""}, {"text": "your_account_id", "italic": true}, {"text": "", forProduction: false)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Objective C", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared]startupWithApplicationKey:@""}, {"text": "your_app_key", "italic": true}, {"text": "" withAppId:@""}, {"text": "your_app_id", "italic": true}, {"text": "" withAccountId:@""}, {"text": "your_account_id", "italic": true}, {"text": "" forProduction:NO];"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "where, "}, {"text": "your_app_key", "italic": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "your_app_id,", "italic": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "your_account_id", "italic": true}, {"text": " are found in the following places:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEo.05T5g00000BkXEoEAN.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkXEo.05T5g00000BkXEoEAN.png", "name": "6.png", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 353, "width": 736}}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Finally, you’ll need to create a new API authentication token for use by the mobile SDK. This is an additional layer of required security. To learn about creating API authentication tokens, see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/28-api-keys?utm_source=community-search&utm_medium=organic-search&utm_term=API+Keys", "children": [{"text": "API Keys", "bold": true}]}, {"text": ". When you create the authentication token, make sure that you’ve given it privileges for Push Notifications."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import the required header files"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Swift", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create YourApp-Bridging-Header.h and import the MPPush header file."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For Xcode 12 (Swift 5.3):"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "#import "}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For Xcode 9 (Swift 4.1.2 and below), Xcode 10 (Swift 5.0), and Xcode 10 (Swift 4.2.1):"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "#import "}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Objective C", "bold": true}, {"text": "
In your AppDelegate.m file, include the following:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "#import "}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "
Start up MPPush services"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The MPPush SDK requires only a single entry point in the app delegate, which is "}, {"text": "startup:", "code": true}, {"text": ". In your AppDeleget.m file,"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "application:didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:", "code": true}, {"text": " method."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Initialize a shared MPPush instance by calling "}, {"text": "[MPPush startup];", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Set preferences "}, {"text": "before", "bold": true}, {"text": " calling "}, {"text": "startup:", "code": true}, {"text": " and provide device data or in-app message customization "}, {"text": "after", "bold": true}, {"text": " calling "}, {"text": "startup:", "code": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Swift", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "func application(_ application: UIApplication, didFinishLaunchingWithOptions launchOptions: [UIApplicationLaunchOptionsKey: Any]?) -> Bool {"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Override point for customization after application launch."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Tell the SDK your preferences BEFORE startup"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// For example, set your preferences for the types of notifications your app should receive:"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setMPUserNotificationTypes(types: [.alert,.badge,.sound])"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Toggle whether the SDK logs progress (YES by default):"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.setLogging(true)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Toggle whether the SDK tracks users by location (NO by default)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.trackLocation(shouldTrack: true)// Will be required for location based segments"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Toggle whether the SDK should auto display In-App Messages (YES by default):"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.shouldAutoDisplayInAppMessages(shouldAutoDisplay: true)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// Number of seconds the SDK will wait to auto-display pending in-app messages after app launch; 3 seconds by default"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setInAppDisplayDelay(second: 0)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.startup(withAuthToken: "your_api_auth_token")"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// OR, if you don't wish to include MPConfig.plist, do:"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "// MPPush.shared.startup(withApplicationKey: "your_app_key", withAppId: "your_app_id", withAccountId: "your_account_id", withAuthToken: "your_api_auth_token", forProduction: true)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "return true"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": following methods can be called anywhere in your application, but must be called after "}, {"text": "startup:", "code": true}, {"text": ", or "}, {"text": "startupWithApplicationKey:withAppId:withAccountId:forProduction:", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setUserLoginID("1234")", "code": true}, {"text": " – Link the device with the user's login ID."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setUserFirstName("John", lastName: "Appleseed")", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the device user's full name (if available)."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setUserEmailID("john@example.com")", "code": true}, {"text": " – Link the device with an email ID (if available) for domain-based segmentation."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.addUserTag("tagToAdd")", "code": true}, {"text": " – Add a tag to the current device for segmentation"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.removeUserTag("tagToRemove")", "code": true}, {"text": " – Remove a tag for the current device."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setInAppFont(inAppFont: myFontFamily)", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired font family to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setPrimaryInAppColor(primaryInAppColor: myTextColor)", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired primary color(text color in Hex code) to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.setSecondaryInAppColor(secondaryInAppColor: myBackgroundColor)", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired secondary color(background color in Hex code) to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "MPPush.shared.displayPendingInAppMessages()", "code": true}, {"text": " – Manually invoke when to display in-app messages in case auto-display is turned off by [MPPush setInAppAutoDisplayMode:]"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Objective C", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "- (BOOL)application:(UIApplication*)application didFinishLaunchingWithOptions:(NSDictionary*)launchOptions {"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Override point for customization after application launch."}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Tell the SDK your preferences BEFORE startup"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // For example, set your preferences for the types of notifications your app should receive:"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] setMPUserNotificationTypesWithTypes:(UNAuthorizationOptionSound | UNAuthorizationOptionAlert | UNAuthorizationOptionBadge)];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Toggle whether the SDK logs progress (YES by default):"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] setLoggingWithValue:YES];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Toggle whether the SDK tracks users by location (NO by default):"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] trackLocationWithShouldTrack:YES];  // Will be required for location based segments"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Toggle whether the SDK should auto display In-App Messages (YES by default):"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] shouldAutoDisplayInAppMessagesWithShouldAutoDisplay:YES];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // Number of seconds the SDK will wait to auto-display pending in-app messages after app launch"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] setInAppDisplayDelayWithSeconds:0]; // (3 seconds by default)"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    [[MPPush shared] startupWithAuthToken:@your_api_auth_token];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // OR, if you don't wish to include MPConfig.plist, do:"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // [MPPush startupWithApplicationKey:@your_app_key withAppId:@your_app_id withAccountId:@your_account_id withAuthToken:@your_api_auth_token forProduction: YES];"}]}, {"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "    // {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All the following API methods can be called anywhere in your application, but must be called after "}, {"text": "startup:", "code": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "startupWithApplicationKey:withAppId:withAccountId:forProduction:", "code": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] setUserLoginID:@"1234"];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Link the device with the user's login ID."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[{MPPush shared] setUserFirstName:@"John" lastName:@"Appleseed"];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the device user's full name (if available)."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] setUserEmailID:@“ravi@maropost.com”];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Link the device with an email ID (if available) for domain-based segmentation."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] addUserTag:@"tagToAdd"];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Add a tag to the current device for segmentation."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] removeUserTag:@"tagToRemove"];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Remove a tag for the current device."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] setInAppFont:myFont];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired font family to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] setPrimaryInAppColor:myTextColor];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired primary color(text color in Hex code) to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] setSecondaryInAppColor:myBackgroundColor"];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Set the desired secondary color(background color in hex code) to use when displaying in-app messages."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "[[MPPush shared] displayPendingInAppMessages”];", "code": true}, {"text": " – Manually invoke when to display in-app messages in case auto-display is turned off by [[MPPush shared] setInAppAutoDisplayMode:]"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Make sure to use the same bundle identifier in your app and in the APNS certificate. This error is the usual reason for devices not receiving push messages sent from Maropost for Marketing. Finally, build your project and you're all set."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Deep Linking From a Push Notification"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Deep linking adds user experience to push notifications. Normally, when a mobile app user clicks a push notification, the mobile app launches, and the app's home screen appears. Deep linking will not only launch the mobile app, but it will also display the specified screen within the app."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this section, you will learn how to enable deep linking within an app and how to configure a deep link URL for a specific screen in the app."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Create an App and Enable Deep Linking"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a basic app in XCode (v8.0.0 or above) consisting of a main ViewController pushed on a UINavigation or ViewController. Also, create some additional ViewControllers to be used later. To enable deep linking, go to the Info tab in the XCode project. In the 'URL Types' section, click on the + button and then add an identifier and a URL scheme. Ensure that the identifier and URL scheme you select are unique to the mobile app."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Remember to take note of the URL scheme you enter, as this is how iOS knows to open a screen in your app. For example, Maropost's own mobile app for iOS uses "}, {"text": "maropost://", "bold": true}, {"text": " as its URL scheme. To confirm that your URL scheme has been registered, check Info.plist for an entry named 'URL Types'. Expand the section to see the new URL scheme you have just registered. You can verify that this scheme is working by typing the following URL into the Safari browser on your mobile device: "}, {"text": "your_url_scheme://", "bold": true, "italic": true}, {"text": " (e.g., "}, {"text": "maropost://", "bold": true}, {"text": "). This should open up your mobile app. The format of a deep link URL is "}, {"text": "[scheme]://[host]/[path],", "bold": true}, {"text": " where:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "scheme", "bold": true}, {"text": " - The URL scheme that you registered. It tells iOS which app to launch. Note that the URL scheme should be registered with the device for it to recognize the link."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "host", "bold": true}, {"text": " - The host is analogous to a website/server name on the web. You can handle multiple hosts within a single mobile app."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "path", "bold": true}, {"text": " - Enables you to provide additional information regarding the location of the screen within the mobile app."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": " "}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Handling the Opening of Registered URLs Within Your App"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once you have confirmed that your URL scheme is registered and the deep linking is working, you will not handle the URL used to launch the mobile app. In its present state, your app can be launched using a simple URL, but not much beyond that will happen. To accomplish true deep linking, you will need to add and override the following function in AppDelegate:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Swift", "children": [{"text": "Implement Rich Push Messages using the Notification Service extension"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Rich push messaging uses the UNNotificationServiceExtension class to create an object that modifies the content of a remote notification before it is delivered to the end user's mobile app. The UNNotificationServiceExtension class provides the entry point for a Notification Service app extension, which lets you customize the content of a remote notification before it is delivered to the user. A Notification Service app extension does not present any UI of its own. Instead, it is launched on demand when a notification of the appropriate type is delivered to the user’s device. You use this extension to modify the notification’s content or download content related to the extension."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, you could use the extension to decrypt an encrypted data block or to download images associated with the notification. You do not create instances of the UNNotificationServiceExtension class yourself. Instead, the Xcode template for a Notification Service Extension target contains a subclass for you to modify. Use the methods of that subclass to implement your app extension’s behavior. When a remote notification for your app is received, the system loads your extension and calls its didReceive(_:withContentHandler:) method only when both of the following conditions are met:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The remote notification is configured to display an alert."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "The remote notification’s app dictionary includes the mutable-content key with the value set to 1."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": 
You cannot modify silent notifications or those that only play a sound or badge the app’s icon. The didReceive(_:withContentHandler:) method performs the main work of your extension. You use that method to make any changes to the notification’s content. 

That method has a limited amount of time to perform its task and execute the provided completion block. If your method does not finish in time, the system calls the serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire() method to give you one last chance to submit your changes. If you do not update the notification content before the time expires, the system displays the original content. 

As for any app extension, you deliver a Notification Service app extension class as a bundle inside your app. The template provided by Xcode configures the Info.plist file automatically for this app extension type. Specifically, it sets the value of the NSExtensionPointIdentifier key to com.apple.usernotifications.service and sets the value of the NSExtensionPrincipalClass key to the name of your UNNotificationServiceExtension subclass. 

For information about how to create and schedule remote notifications using the Apple Push Notification service (APNS), see Local and Remote Notification Programming Guide. The Xcode templates provide a subclass of UNNotificationServiceExtension for you to modify. You must implement the didReceive(_:withContentHandler:) method and use it to process incoming notifications. It is also strongly recommended that you override the serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire() method."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Swift", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following method is called when there is a notification ready to be modified:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "func didReceive(UNNotificationRequest, withContentHandler: (UNNotificationContent) -> Void)"}]}], "lang": "swift"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following method is called when an extension is about to be terminated:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "func serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire()"}]}], "lang": "go"},
